hypotheticalNaiveFullSpecInContext.description: 14 search intents in workflow-gke-cloudflare-jira.mjs: 5 Google + 5 Cloudflare + 4 Jira. Token counts are ceil(specBytes/4) per provider corpus on disk.

variantA_exclusiveContextPerProvider.assumption: Start fresh when switching provider; load that provider’s full spec once when entering the segment. Count total unique spec tokens materialized across the workflow (each of the three corpora exactly once).
variantA_exclusiveContextPerProvider.note: Same total as pasting all three specs once if every byte is loaded exactly once across the run; ignores duplicate resends within a segment.

variantB_fullSpecResentEveryModelTurn.assumption: Each of the 14 model requests includes the full spec for the active provider in the input (typical stateless chat API without prompt caching). Spec-only input tokens; excludes growing chat history and queries.

savingsVsVariantB_specOnlyVsArtifact.note: Compares variant B spec-only subtotal to offline workflow JSON token estimate; does not include assistant output or tool wrappers on either side.

meta.method: Compare bytes/tokens for full loaded provider specs vs emitted multi-provider workflow output (historical capture multi-provider-test.md; bytes preserved pre-archive trim).
